title: helichrysum lastii
intro: Helichrysum lastii, also known as the Alpine Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its delicate yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its healing effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum lastii include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Helichrysum lastii is often prepared in herbal form, either as a dried flower infusion, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
